claims.summary: A direct address must cite a specific Minime-authored source without becoming a steward message.
claims.disposition: verify peer actors, shared anchor, reflection surface, and reply lineage

claims.summary: Mutual witness needs a distinct receipt representation.
claims.disposition: verify mutual_witness_signal, presence_receipt, ACK kinds, and right-to-ignore semantics

claims.summary: Specific-line address latency and subsequent Astrid-to-Minime activity need observation.
claims.disposition: route a bounded public-metadata latency replay

claims.summary: Shadow response after explicit acknowledgement is not established by reply linkage.
claims.disposition: route a read-only time-aligned Shadow comparison and retain causal uncertainty

claims.summary: Increasing autonomous-lane weight or relaxing semantic trickle changes live admission.
